     the Fermi energy is    -0.3049 ev

!    total energy              =  -10339.99056408 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.8E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.14939549 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -10339.84116859 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -220296.11209148 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  111178.04311850 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4254.85966472 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  103035.06928906 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.98181995 Ry

     total magnetization       =    90.11 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    96.29 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  41 iterations
